reason: All acceptance criteria verified. PHASE2_TABLE_DEFS contains exactly 2 tables: emotion_history and edge_cases. emotion_history has 6 columns (id/unified_user_id/conversation_id/category/intensity/created_at) with FK, NOT NULL, and CHECK constraints. edge_cases has 7 columns (id/query/expected_intent/expected_answer/status/annotated_at/used_in_regression) with NOT NULL, DEFAULT, and CHECK. ivfflat index on knowledge_base embeddings using vector_cosine_ops lists=100. idx_emotion_history_user_time index on (unified_user_id, created_at DESC). No Phase 1 table duplication. All 13/13 tests pass. Coverage 100%.
